title: Environmental Health Mission and Vision
content:
Environmental Health Mission and Vision

Mission and Vision

Train environmental technicians in the public and private sectors who have high professional knowledge, environmental awareness and respect for ethical values, constantly improve themselves, follow technological developments, think analytically, produce practical and permanent solutions.

To be a leading department with high-quality environmental awareness, professional knowledge and environmental technicians that it brings to business life with the education and training provided.
